ques: Locate an online course on Coursera related to 'Sustainability' that belongs to Physical Science and Engineering subject. The course should include a module on Measuring Sustainability. Note the course duration and the offering institution.
answer: "Introduction to Sustainability" — offered by the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign (Physical Science and Engineering subject). It contains 8 modules including "Measuring Sustainability" (4 hours), and the course duration is about 3 weeks to complete at ~10 hours per week.
